treeDensity.title: Tree Density
treeDensity.tooltip: Controls the amount of extra trees on Timber Hearth

grassDensity.title: Grass Density
grassDensity.tooltip: Controls the amount of extra grass tufts on Timber Hearth

cloudDensity.title: Cloud Density
cloudDensity.tooltip: Controls the amount of clouds around Timber Hearth

fireflyEnabled.title: Fireflies Visible
fireflyEnabled.tooltip: Controls the time frame when fireflies are visible

fireflyDensity.title: Firefly Density
fireflyDensity.tooltip: Controls the amount of firefly emitters on Timber Hearth

treeOcclusionOptimisation.title: Tree Occlusion Optimisation
treeOcclusionOptimisation.tooltip: When enabled trees which are hidden from the camera's view are disabled

extraTreesHemisphereGradientEnabled.title: Terrain hemisphere tree gradient
extraTreesHemisphereGradientEnabled.tooltip: When on, trees thin out on one side of Timber Hearth and get denser on the other. Uses planet local axes. Does not affect grass or fireflies. Turn on Hard cut for a sharp zero-or-full split instead of a smooth ramp.

extraTreesHemisphereHardEdge.title: Hemisphere - hard cut (full vs none)
extraTreesHemisphereHardEdge.tooltip: Only when hemisphere mode is on. On: one side keeps full tree density in each slot, the other side has none (step at the plane). Off: smooth ramp using the transition width slider.

extraTreesHemispherePlaneOffset.title: Hemisphere - plane offset
extraTreesHemispherePlaneOffset.tooltip: Slides the sparse-or-dense boundary along the dense direction. 0 keeps the default split.

extraTreesHemisphereYawDeg.title: Hemisphere - yaw (degrees)
extraTreesHemisphereYawDeg.tooltip: Rotates the dense direction around Timber Hearth local Y.

extraTreesHemispherePitchDeg.title: Hemisphere - pitch (degrees)
extraTreesHemispherePitchDeg.tooltip: Tilts the dense direction. Combine with yaw to aim where the thick forest sits.

extraTreesHemisphereBlend.title: Hemisphere - transition width
extraTreesHemisphereBlend.tooltip: Smooth mode only. How wide the blend band is (dot product space). Ignored when Hard cut is on.

extraTreesGrowthPercent.title: Extra Trees Current Growth
extraTreesGrowthPercent.tooltip: 0% = smallest (saplings), 100% = full size for the current max-size mode. Auto-growth moves this while the multiplier and speed are above zero; you can also drag it manually.

extraTreesGrowthSpeedPercentPerSec.title: Extra Trees Auto-Growth Speed
extraTreesGrowthSpeedPercentPerSec.tooltip: How many percentage points per second are added to Current Growth while auto-growth is active (multiplier > 0).

extraTreesGrowthIntensity.title: Extra Trees Auto-Growth Multiplier
extraTreesGrowthIntensity.tooltip: 0 = auto-growth paused. Multiplies Auto-Growth Speed when advancing the Current Growth slider.

extraTreesRandomPerTreeMax.title: Random max size per tree
extraTreesRandomPerTreeMax.tooltip: Off: same max size for every tree (only the overall scale slider applies). On: each tree rolls its own max size factor in the min/max range below; use Randomize to re-roll.

extraTreesRandomPerTreeKMin.title: Random per-tree size - minimum (x)
extraTreesRandomPerTreeKMin.tooltip: Lower bound for each tree's random size factor when random max is on (inclusive). Range is smaller so random trees do not dominate overall scale.

extraTreesRandomPerTreeKMax.title: Random per-tree size - maximum (x)
extraTreesRandomPerTreeKMax.tooltip: Upper bound for each tree's random size factor when random max is on (inclusive). If below the minimum, the mod swaps them.

extraTreesGlobalScale.title: Extra Trees Overall Scale
extraTreesGlobalScale.tooltip: Uniform scale for all mod trees. Stacks with per-tree random size (k), so the mod uses a curved response: small steps change height less, especially near the max. Raw range is intentionally narrow.

extraTreesGiantCount.title: Giant trees count
extraTreesGiantCount.tooltip: How many extra trees become giants (clamped to how many trees actually spawned). 0 disables giants.

extraTreesGiantSizeMultiplier.title: Giant tree size ramp (5-10)
extraTreesGiantSizeMultiplier.tooltip: 5 = giants match normal trees at full growth. 10 = up to about 2.75x at full growth. Sapling size matches neighbors; only full-grown height is boosted so giants read clearly in the forest.

extraTreesGiantShuffleSelection.title: Shuffle which trees are giants
extraTreesGiantShuffleSelection.tooltip: Flip this checkbox to pick a new random set of giant trees (same count as above).

extraTreesPerTreeScaleAction.title: Per-tree random size
extraTreesPerTreeScaleAction.tooltip: Only applies when the Random max size per tree toggle is on. Choose Randomize once to roll a new random size factor per tree within the min and max sliders, then switch back to Idle to randomize again later.

extraTreesResetGrowthAction.title: Restart growth from saplings
options: Reset to saplings (min size, grow again)
extraTreesResetGrowthAction.tooltip: Choose Reset once to set all extra trees back to minimum growth (sapling size). Switch back to Idle before using Reset again.
